capabilities.determinism_impact: presentation only unless explicitly used for proof capture
capabilities.security_impact: none declared
capabilities.notes: Provider model and runtime selection remain future work.

capabilities.description: Null renderer capability for headless or test contexts.
capabilities.determinism_impact: presentation omitted; authoritative truth unchanged
capabilities.security_impact: none declared
capabilities.notes: Null render selection must still be explicit evidence, not silent fallback.

capabilities.determinism_impact: presentation and input hosting only
capabilities.security_impact: platform APIs require provider isolation and review
capabilities.notes: Provider conformance remains PROVIDER-MODEL-01.

capabilities.determinism_impact: storage ordering must be canonical where artifacts are hashed
capabilities.security_impact: local paths and permissions require explicit policy
capabilities.notes: Storage runtime behavior is not implemented by this law.

capabilities.determinism_impact: validation output must be deterministic for the same input
capabilities.security_impact: untrusted packages require refusal/trust policy
capabilities.notes: Package runtime and mod trust remain later tasks.

capabilities.determinism_impact: presentation only; validation authority remains command/evidence surface
capabilities.security_impact: Workbench must not call private validators as authority
capabilities.notes: Workbench UI is not implemented by this task.

capabilities.description: Fast strict proof gate command capability.
capabilities.determinism_impact: proof output must be reproducible enough for audit
capabilities.security_impact: tool execution stays local and governed by task scope
capabilities.notes: Registered because the fast strict runner exists.

capabilities.description: Repository validation capability for layout, roots, public surfaces, and governance checks.
capabilities.determinism_impact: validator output should be stable for the same checkout
capabilities.security_impact: local repository inspection only
capabilities.notes: Umbrella capability; individual validators remain command-surface entries.

capabilities.determinism_impact: validation output must be stable for identical inputs
capabilities.security_impact: none declared
capabilities.notes: Registered to support package and artifact validation policy references.

capabilities.determinism_impact: presentation only; command/evidence surfaces remain authority
capabilities.security_impact: Workbench modules must not call private tools directly
capabilities.notes: Registered by MODULE-COMPOSITION-LAW-01; implementation remains future work.

capabilities.description: Project graph Workbench workspace composition capability.
capabilities.determinism_impact: presentation only
capabilities.security_impact: workspace must bind commands/views instead of private tools
capabilities.notes: Workspace model only; Workbench UI is not implemented.

capabilities.scope: app descriptors and app composition law
capabilities.determinism_impact: composition metadata only
capabilities.security_impact: apps must not bind private implementation paths
capabilities.notes: Registered by MODULE-COMPOSITION-LAW-01.

capabilities.determinism_impact: module activation must be explicit and evidenced
capabilities.security_impact: pack module trust is governed by pack/module trust law
capabilities.notes: MOD-PACK-TRUST-MODEL-01 deepens this later.

capabilities.description: Data-only mod or pack capability with no executable, filesystem, network, process, or native authority.
capabilities.determinism_impact: deterministic when schema and data rules pass
capabilities.security_impact: minimal; no external authority
capabilities.notes: Registered by MOD-PACK-TRUST-MODEL-01.

capabilities.description: Schema-validated mod or pack data capability.
capabilities.determinism_impact: deterministic after schema validation
capabilities.security_impact: no executable authority
capabilities.notes: Validation proof is required before active composition.

capabilities.determinism_impact: determinism impact must be declared
capabilities.security_impact: registry or world-state contributions require process/data law
capabilities.notes: Arbitrary scripting is not enabled.

capabilities.determinism_impact: tooling/presentation only unless commands produce artifacts
capabilities.security_impact: must invoke registered commands instead of private tools
capabilities.notes: Workbench UI and module runtime are not implemented by this law.

capabilities.scope: external adapter trust and permission declaration
capabilities.determinism_impact: not replay-safe unless explicitly isolated or refused
capabilities.security_impact: process, filesystem, and network authority must be declared
capabilities.notes: No process launcher or IPC runtime is implemented.

capabilities.scope: trusted build or release boundary native provider
capabilities.determinism_impact: provider conformance required
capabilities.security_impact: native code requires trusted boundary, ABI policy, and conformance evidence
capabilities.notes: Native loading is not implemented.

capabilities.scope: future signed native provider policy scaffold
capabilities.determinism_impact: future assurance proof required
capabilities.security_impact: signing, release, and assurance policy required before enablement
capabilities.notes: Defined as future policy only.

capabilities.determinism_impact: overlay order and conflicts must be declared
capabilities.security_impact: silent overwrite is forbidden
capabilities.notes: Runtime mount planning is future work.

capabilities.determinism_impact: bundle composition must produce ordered evidence later
capabilities.security_impact: bundle cannot silently escalate member pack authority
capabilities.notes: Bundle trust decision runtime is future work.

capabilities.description: Headless host platform capability for validation and server-style runtime lanes.
capabilities.determinism_impact: headless mode avoids presentation nondeterminism
capabilities.security_impact: no additional authority beyond host validation context
capabilities.notes: Registered by PORTABILITY-MATRIX-01; not a release support claim.

capabilities.determinism_impact: platform APIs must stay outside authoritative simulation truth
capabilities.security_impact: platform authority requires provider and trust policy
capabilities.notes: Broad Windows support still requires evidence-backed matrix rows.

capabilities.determinism_impact: filesystem, threading, and process behavior must be declared per target
capabilities.security_impact: platform authority requires provider and trust policy
capabilities.notes: POSIX rows are planned/research unless evidence proves them.

capabilities.description: MSVC v143 toolchain portability evidence capability.
capabilities.determinism_impact: build outputs must use reproducible build identity rules when promoted
capabilities.security_impact: machine-local paths are forbidden in support claims
capabilities.notes: Toolchain entry is not a support claim by itself.

capabilities.determinism_impact: portable package paths and manifests must be deterministic
capabilities.security_impact: portable packages must not silently expand filesystem authority
capabilities.notes: Portable package support still requires release/package proof.

capabilities.determinism_impact: CLI command output must be evidence-backed when used as proof
capabilities.security_impact: command authority remains governed by command/capability law
capabilities.notes: CLI proof does not imply release support.

capabilities.determinism_impact: headless paths are the default proof baseline
capabilities.security_impact: runtime authority remains governed by command/capability law
capabilities.notes: Headless mode remains provisional until release proof exists.

capabilities.determinism_impact: presentation only unless render artifacts are used as proof
capabilities.security_impact: renderer/provider selection must be explicit
capabilities.notes: Rendered mode is not supported without product and renderer proof.

capabilities.description: Full native 64-bit source architecture tier capability.
capabilities.scope: x86_64 and arm64 full native product architecture tier.
capabilities.determinism_impact: architecture selection must not affect authoritative simulation truth or stable artifact identity
capabilities.security_impact: native execution support claims require evidence and refusal behavior
capabilities.notes: Architecture capability policy only; no provider or product support is implemented.

capabilities.scope: Optional reduced native lane for x86/armv7 with limitations.
capabilities.determinism_impact: architecture selection must not affect authoritative simulation truth or stable artifact identity
capabilities.security_impact: native execution support claims require evidence and refusal behavior
capabilities.notes: Architecture capability policy only; no provider or product support is implemented.

capabilities.scope: Projection lane for viewers, snapshots, thin clients, and generated subsets.
capabilities.determinism_impact: architecture selection must not affect authoritative simulation truth or stable artifact identity
capabilities.security_impact: native execution support claims require evidence and refusal behavior
capabilities.notes: Architecture capability policy only; no provider or product support is implemented.

capabilities.scope: VM, emulator, museum, archive replay, and research execution lane.
capabilities.determinism_impact: architecture selection must not affect authoritative simulation truth or stable artifact identity
capabilities.security_impact: native execution support claims require evidence and refusal behavior
capabilities.notes: Architecture capability policy only; no provider or product support is implemented.
